src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/admin/Admi.general_idea: Change updateDatabase methods to return job IDs instead of void, allowing asynchronous tracking of database updates.
src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/admin/Admi.human_impl: Changed `void updateDatabase()` to `int updateDatabase()` and `void updateDatabase(String path)` to `int updateDatabase(String path)`.

src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/admin/Admi.general_idea: Add a new rescan method to the Admin interface to support rescanning unmodified files.
Remove the getDaemonUpTime method from the Admin interface, likely moving it to a status object or deprecating it.
Rename the property key for the REFRESH command from 'admin.refresh' to 'admin.update' to align with MPD protocol terminology.

src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/album/Albu.general_idea: Change the return type of the functional interface method from List to Collection to allow more flexible implementations.
